name: Mideastern Cashew Pitas
recipeIngredient: 2 teaspoons Fresh cilantro, chopped or parsley, chopped
1/2 cup Chopped red and/or green sweet pepper
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium mixing bowl, stir together the plain yogurt, chopped cilantro or parsley, and curry powder.
2. Stir in the cashews, chopped cucumber, sweet pepper, and red onion until evenly distributed.
3. Spoon the mixture evenly into the split pita rounds.
4. Allow to cool before serving.
